name: Love and Crime
short_description: A visual novel with an exciting detective and romantic plot. Take on a dangerous investigation and find your love in a lost Japanese town.
detailed_description:
A visual novel with a gripping detective and romantic plot.

7 (seven) different shocking endings await you!

Immerse yourself in a world of passion and secrets, where your decisions influence the storyline. At the center of this detective novel is the brave girl Hikari. Her dreams of a dangerous job, the experience of growing up, exciting romantic encounters with handsome guys and a mysterious new friend. In addition to inner experiences and love relationships, Hikari seeks to uncover the truth about the mysterious Criminal Syndicate.

To love and survive? Yes! The closeness with your favorite guy and the fight against the Criminal Syndicate depend on your choices. Will you remain on the side of good? With which of the guys will you find love?

This detective novel promises something more than just entertainment - it's a story that will leave a mark on your heart!

This game is not suitable for children

or those who are easily disturbed.
